ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved – Jira & GitHub Update
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that ticket #12345 has been resolved.

The issue with the custom deployment script has been fixed and the corrected script has been committed to the main branch on GitHub. The changes are now merged into the corresponding Jira ticket.

Please review the commit history on GitHub and verify that the deployment behavior is as expected. Once confirmed, you can close the ticket in Jira.

Thanks for your collaboration!

Best regards,
John Doe
Software Engineer

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Microsoft 365 Password Expiration Notice
spam.body:
Dear User,

Microsoft Security has detected that your Microsoft 365 password is set to expire within 24 hours. If you do not update your password before the expiration date, your account will be temporarily suspended, which may result in loss of access to critical business services and potential billing implications.

To ensure uninterrupted service, please verify and update your password immediately by clicking the link below:

<URL>

You will be prompted to enter your current password and create a new one. This process is required to maintain the security and integrity of your Microsoft 365 environment.

If you did not initiate this request, please contact Microsoft Support immediately to investigate possible security concerns.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
Microsoft Security Team
